description:
OBD-II ELM327 adapter emulator for testing diagnostic apps
Simulates an ELM327 OBD-II interface over Bluetooth/BLE/network.
Useful for development and testing without a real vehicle.
Support many protocols CAN, KWP2000, ... any supported by ELM327.
Support OBD-II messages.
Track what have been sent by the scantool using the log.
